title: Array-Based Queue Implementation
description: A visual representation of a queue data structure implemented using an array, showing the 'front' and 'rear' pointers, enqueue and dequeue operations, and the concept of a circular buffer.
relationships: Front pointer indicates the next element to dequeue
Rear pointer indicates the next available slot for enqueue
Enqueue operation adds an element at the rear and increments rear
Dequeue operation removes an element from the front and increments front
When pointers reach the end, they wrap around to create a circular queue
